purpose: Record advisory/interrupter combat feat pass for Clone Wars and Legacy Era feats.

implementedEntries.name: Anointed Hunter
implementedEntries.mechanic: Exposes +1 competence attack advisory for thrown weapons when movement context says the actor ended its move at least 2 squares from where it started.

implementedEntries.name: Droid Hunter
implementedEntries.mechanic: Exposes +2 damage advisory against Droid targets while proficient, or +4 if the weapon/context deals ion damage. Uses target droid metadata when supplied or actor type/species text fallback.

implementedEntries.name: Separatist Military Training
implementedEntries.mechanic: Exposes +1 circumstance attack advisory once per turn when adjacent ally context is supplied.

implementedEntries.name: Brink of Death
implementedEntries.mechanic: Exposes a damage-outcome choice when an attack would defeat a target: reduce to 0 HP, unconscious but alive.

implementedEntries.name: Fatal Hit
implementedEntries.mechanic: Exposes a damage-outcome choice when an attack drops a target to 0 HP and exposes an action economy override changing Coup de Grace from full-round to standard action.

implementedEntries.name: Galactic Alliance Military Training
implementedEntries.mechanic: Exposes an encounter-scoped interrupt resource that can ignore the first condition-track movement caused by an attack exceeding Damage Threshold. Uses EncounterUseTracker.

automationBoundary.advisoryModifiers: Attack workflow must supply movement, target, adjacency, proficiency, and damage-type context and decide whether to display/apply advisory modifiers.
automationBoundary.damageOutcomeChoices: Damage application workflow must present and apply the outcome choice at the defeat/drop-to-zero decision point.
automationBoundary.conditionTrackInterrupt: Condition track resolver must call getConditionTrackInterrupts and spendConditionTrackInterrupt before applying the first qualifying encounter condition-track movement.
